# custom_business_partner_company_group_contact (Resource)

Create or update the Company Group in the Business Partner application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "custom_business_partner_company_group_contact" "main" {
  display_id       = "SEQ-1"
  tenant_subdomain = "porrag-dev"
  given_name       = "Foo"
  family_name      = "Bar"
  email_address    = "foo.bar+dev-porr@sequello.com"
  phone            = "4212345678"
  mobile           = "4212345678"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_id` (String) Human-readable unique identifier
- `email_address` (String) Unique e-mail address that receives the onboarding email to set a password
- `family_name` (String) Lastname
- `given_name` (String) Firstname
- `mobile` (String) Mobile phone number
- `phone` (String) Phone number
- `tenant_subdomain` (String) Tenant subdomain

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# terraform import btp_directory.<resource_name> <display_id>,<tenant_subdomain>

terraform import custom_business_partner_company_group_contact.main SEQ-1,porr-dev

# terraform import using id attribute in import block

import {
  to = custom_business_partner_company_group_contact.<resource_name>
  id = "<display_id>,<tenant_subdomain>"
}

import {
  to = custom_business_partner_company_group_contact.<resource_name>
  identity = {
    directory_id = "<display_id>,<tenant_subdomain>"
  }
}
```
